---
title: "Project"
author: "Hintz A"
format: html
editor: visual
---

Packages

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(sf)
library(factoextra)
library(ibd)
library(gstat)
library(sp)
library(anticlust)
library(agricolae)
library(cmdstanr)
library(pbapply)
library(posterior)
library(geoR)
library(lattice)
library(parallel)
```

Data

```{r, message=FALSE}
data <- read_csv("projeto_data.csv") 

EC_mat <- data |>
  filter(row_id <=15) |> 
  select(row_id, ew_group, ec_mean) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = ew_group,
    values_from = ec_mean
  ) |>
  arrange(row_id) |> 
  select(-row_id) |>
  as.matrix()

```

```{r}
# geodados <- as.geodata(EC_mat)
# 
# hmax <- summary(geodados)[[3]][[2]]*0.8
# 
# 
# vario <- variog(geodados,max.dist = hmax)
# gau <- variofit(vario, cov.model = "gau")
# 
# 
# plot(vario) +
# lines(gau)
```

Plot

```{r}
image(EC_mat)
```

Cluster my data

```{r}
field_long <- as.data.frame(EC_mat) |>
  mutate(linha = row_number()) |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -linha,
    names_to = "coluna",
    values_to = "valor"
  ) |>
  mutate(coluna = as.numeric(gsub("V", "", coluna)))

field_long

field_scaled <- scale(field_long)
```

Sets

```{r}
n = 15; k = 4
N = n * k
# s <- 10
n_treat <- 15
treat <- paste0("T", 1:n_treat)
 
n_block <- c(1, 4, 6, 10, 15, 20)

iter_sampling <- 10
ncores <- detectCores() - 1


sim_ec <- cmdstan_model("ec_generated.stan")
sim_yield <- cmdstan_model("yield_gen.stan")
model_fit <- cmdstan_model("fit_model.stan")

# analytic prior sd per treatment, matching fit_model.stan exactly
#prior_sigma <- c(2, rep(6, 4), rep(6, 4), rep(6, 3), rep(6, 3))  # T1, T2-5, T6-9, T10-12, T13-15
#h_prior <- 0.5 * log(2 * pi * exp(1) * prior_sigma^2)

results <- data.frame(
  field = integer(),
  block_n = integer(),
  obs_id = integer(),
  entropy = numeric(),
  lower_ci = numeric(),
  upper_ci = numeric(),
  sigma = numeric(),
  mean_post = numeric(),
  posterior_prob = numeric()
)

coords <- expand.grid(Lat = 1:k, Long = 1:n)

coords<- coords |> 
  mutate(block_id = case_when(Long < 5 ~ 1,
                              Long >=5 & Long < 9 ~ 2,
                              Long >=9 & Long < 12 ~3,
                              Long >= 12 ~4))
```

Data generating

```{r}
data_simu <- list(
    N  = N,
    K = n_treat,
    J = k,
    coord = as.matrix(coords[,c("Lat", "Long")]),
    block_id = coords$block_id
  )


  sim <- sim_ec$sample(
    data = data_simu,
    chains = 1,
    fixed_param = TRUE,
    iter_sampling   = iter_sampling,    
    seed            = 124
  )


ec_rep <- sim$draws("ec_rep", format = "matrix")
```

Function Randomize treatments

```{r}
# Função auxiliar: aloca tratamentos aos blocos sem repetir dentro do bloco
assign_treatments_no_repeat <- function(n_treat, r, b, block_size, max_tries = 1000) {
  N <- n_treat * r
  stopifnot(N == b * block_size)
  
  for (attempt in 1:max_tries) {
    remaining <- rep(1:n_treat, times = r)   # cada tratamento tem r "fichas" a distribuir
    block_list <- vector("list", b)
    ok <- TRUE
    
    block_order <- sample(1:b)  # ordem aleatória de preenchimento dos blocos
    
    for (blk in block_order) {
      avail_treats <- unique(remaining)       # tratamentos que ainda têm ficha sobrando
      if (length(avail_treats) < block_size) {
        ok <- FALSE
        break                                  # essa tentativa não deu certo, tenta de novo
      }
      chosen <- sample(avail_treats, block_size, replace = FALSE)  # sem reposição -> sem repetir no bloco
      block_list[[blk]] <- chosen
      for (tt in chosen) {
        remaining <- remaining[-match(tt, remaining)]  # consome uma ficha de cada escolhido
      }
    }
    
    if (ok && length(remaining) == 0) return(block_list)
  }
  stop("Não foi possível gerar alocação sem repetição após ", max_tries, " tentativas.")
}
```

Loop

```{r}
for(i in 1:iter_sampling){
  print(i)
  
  ec_rep_i <- as.numeric(ec_rep[i,])
  
  
  field <- cbind(coords, ec_rep_i)
  
  field_scaled <- scale(field)
  

  for(b in n_block){
    
  print(b)
  N_total <- nrow(field)
  block_size <- as.integer(N_total / b)
  
  r <- N_total / n_treat
  stopifnot(r == round(r))
  
  if(b == 1){
    # CRD - Completely Randomized Design
    field_cluster <- field |> mutate(Block = 1L)
    
    trt_vec <- sample(rep(1:n_treat, times = r))  # embaralha os 60 rótulos
    
    design <- tibble(
      Block         = 1L,
      plot_in_block = 1:N_total,
      trt_id        = trt_vec
    ) |>
      mutate(Treatment = treat[trt_id])
    
    # checagem
    stopifnot(all(table(design$trt_id) == r))
  } else {
  
  # With blocking  
  groups <- balanced_clustering(field_scaled, K = b)
  field_cluster <- field |> mutate(Block = as.integer(groups))
  
  # --- aloca tratamentos garantindo: r reps totais + sem repetir dentro do bloco ---
  block_list <- assign_treatments_no_repeat(n_treat, r, b, block_size)
  
  design <- map_dfr(1:b, function(blk) {
    tibble(
      Block  = blk,
      trt_id = sample(block_list[[blk]])   # embaralha a ordem dentro do bloco
    )
  }) |>
    group_by(Block) |>
    mutate(plot_in_block = row_number()) |>
    ungroup() |>
    mutate(Treatment = treat[trt_id])
  
  # check
  stopifnot(all(table(design$trt_id) == r))                       
  stopifnot(all(design |> count(Block, trt_id) |> pull(n) == 1))  
  
  }
  
  # --- anexa aos plots espaciais reais ---
  field_end <- field_cluster |>
    group_by(Block) |>
    mutate(plot_in_block = row_number()) |>
    ungroup() |>
    left_join(design, by = c("Block", "plot_in_block"))
  
  # table(field_end$Block)
  # table(field_end$trt_id)
  # table(field_end$trt_id, field_end$Block)
  
  field_end <- field_end |> mutate(Block = factor(Block))
  
  # Simulation Model Yield
  data_sim <- list(
    N  = N,
    K = n_treat,
    J = b,
    coord = as.matrix(field_end[,c("Lat", "Long")]),
    blocks = field_end$Block,
    trt = field_end$trt_id,
    ec = field_end$ec_rep_i
  )
  
 
  yield_sim <- sim_yield$sample(
    data = data_sim,
    chains = 3,
    fixed_param = TRUE,
    iter_sampling   = 1,
    seed            = 1234,
    num_cores = ncores
  )
  
  yield_rep <- sim$draws("y_rep", format = "matrix")
  
  # Fitting model
  data_fit <- list(
    N  = N,
    K = n_treat,
    J = b,
    coord = as.matrix(field_end[,c("Lat", "Long")]),
    blocks = field_end$Block,
    trt = field_end$trt_id,
    y = yield_rep
  )
  

  fit <- model_fit$sample(
    data = data_fit,
    chains = 3,
    parallel_chains = 3,
    iter_warmup     = 200,
    iter_sampling   = 100,
    seed            = 1234,
    num_cores = ncores
  )
  
  # Saving Results
  
  
  T_draws <- fit$draws("T", format = "matrix")
  
  post_summary <- t(apply(T_draws, 2, function(draws) {
    s <- sd(draws)
    q <- quantile(draws, c(0.025, 0.975))
    c(mean = mean(draws), sigma = s,
      entropy = 0.5 * log(2 * pi * exp(1) * s^2),
      lower_ci = q[1], upper_ci = q[2])
  }))
  post_summary <- as.data.frame(post_summary)
  post_summary$trt_id        <- 1:n_treat
  
  
  # Contraste T1 vs cada um dos demais tratamentos
  diff_draws <- sapply(2:n_treat, function(j)
    T_draws[,1] - T_draws[,j]
  )
  
  # Probabilidade posterior para cada contraste
  prob <- apply(diff_draws, 2, function(x) mean(x < 0))

  
  # Maybe saving with the blocks and treatments assigned
  results <- rbind(results, data.frame(
    field         = i,
    block_n       = b,
    trt_id        = post_summary$trt_id,
    entropy       = post_summary$entropy,
    lower_ci      = post_summary$lower_ci,
    upper_ci      = post_summary$upper_ci,
    sigma         = post_summary$sigma,
    mean_post     = post_summary$mean,
    posterior_prob = c(NA, prob)
  ))

  }  

}

```

```{r}
results
write.table(results, "results3.txt")
```

```{r}
results |> 
  group_by(block_n, trt_id) |> 
  filter(trt_id == 1) |> 
  summarise(entropy = mean(entropy),
            sigma = mean(sigma))
```
